name: gibbon_chr25_centromere
description: Nomascus leucogenys chr25 centromere / pericentromere. Alpha-satellite higher-order repeat (HOR) array; 12-monomer HOR unit (~2052 bp). T2T-resolved alpha-sat array; flanked by ape-lineage GibbonSAT satellite blocks. Centromere mapping is HOR-aware; LLmap should refuse to silently collapse cross-species divergence here.
expected_copy_count: thousands of 171 bp alpha-satellite monomers in 12-mer HOR units, tandemly arrayed over 2.3 Mb
